2604.24916.title: asRoBallet: Closing the Sim2Real Gap via Friction-Aware Reinforcement Learning for Underactuated Spherical Dynamics
2604.24916.paper_summary: We introduce asRoBallet, to the best of our knowledge, the first successful deployment of reinforcement learning (RL) on a humanoid ballbot hardware. Historically, ballbots have served as a canonical benchmark for underactuated and nonholonomic control, which are characterized by a reality gap in complex friction models for wheel-sphere-ground interactions. While current literature demonstrates successful handling of 3D balancing with LQR and MPC, transitioning to actual hardware for a humanoid ballbot using RL is currently hindered by critical gaps in contact modeling, actuator latency & jitter, and safe hardware exploration, and safe hardware exploration. This study proposes a high-fidelity MuJoCo simulation that explicitly models the discrete roller mechanics of ETH-type omni-wheels, thereby capturing parasitic vibrations and contact discontinuities that are previously ignored. We also developed a Friction-Aware Reinforcement Learning framework that achieves zero-shot Sim2Real transfer by mastering the coupled rolling, lateral, and torsional friction channels at the wheel-sphere and sphere-ground interfaces. We designed asRoBallet through subtractive reconfiguration, repurposing key components from an overconstrained quadruped and integrating them into a newly designed structural frame to achieve a robust research platform at low cost. We also developed a generalized iOS ecosystem that transforms consumer electronics into a low-latency interface, enabling a single operator to orchestrate expressive humanoid maneuvers via intuitive natural motion.
2604.24916.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹asRoBallet，據我們所知，這是首次成功在類人球形機器人硬體上部署強化學習（RL）。歷史上，球形機器人一直作為欠驅動和非完整控制的經典基準，這些控制特徵在於複雜摩擦模型中存在現實差距，特別是在輪子-球體-地面互動方面。雖然當前文獻展示了使用LQR和MPC成功處理3D平衡，但轉向使用RL的類人球形機器人實際硬體目前受到接觸建模、驅動器延遲和抖動以及安全硬體探索等關鍵問題的阻礙。本研究提出了一個高保真度的MuJoCo模擬，明確建模ETH型全向輪的離散滾輪力學，從而捕捉先前被忽略的寄生振動和接觸不連續性。我們還開發了一個摩擦感知強化學習框架，通過掌握輪子-球體和球體-地面界面上的耦合滾動、側向和扭轉摩擦通道，實現零樣本的Sim2Real轉移。我們通過減法重構設計了asRoBallet，重新利用來自過度約束的四足機器人的關鍵組件，並將其整合到新設計的結構框架中，以低成本實現穩健的研究平台。我們還開發了一個通用的iOS生態系統，將消費電子產品轉變為低延遲接口，使單一操作員能夠通過直觀的自然動作協調表達性的類人動作。
2604.24916.author: Fang Wan et.al.
2604.24916.authors: Fang Wan, Guangyi Huang, Tianyu Wu, Zishang Zhang, Bangchao Huang, Haoran Sun, Mingdong Chen, Chaoyang Song
